rightGridLayout: 3x4 square cards with function names only

functions.name: Health Score
userFlow: User clicks 'Health Score' in left sidebar
Clean form appears with 5 fields: Startup Name, Sector, Stage, Target Markets, Short Description
Big green button: Calculate Health Score
Result shows large score number + breakdown bars + key insights
Buttons: View 12-Month Roadmap | Improve My Score

functions.name: Pitch Readiness
userFlow: Large drag-and-drop area for PDF or PPTX
Result: Overall score + slide-by-slide feedback + predicted funding probability

functions.name: Technical Readiness
userFlow: Option to upload documents or fill quick form
Result: TRL score + risk analysis + recommended next steps

functions.name: Regulatory Crystal Ball
userFlow: Result: Country-by-country probability + missing documents checklist

functions.name: Investor Mind Reader
userFlow: Result: Personalized advice + predicted questions + win probability

functions.name: Failure Predictor
userFlow: Result: Top 5 failure risks with probability + prevention steps

functions.name: Clinical Trial Oracle
userFlow: Enter protocol summary or upload document
Result: Success probability + timeline + cost estimate + recommendations

functions.name: Team Chemistry Simulator
userFlow: Current team overview + new candidate info
Result: Fit score + predicted conflicts + onboarding plan

functions.name: Exit Maximizer
userFlow: Result: Best exit strategy + timeline + valuation forecast

functions.name: Future Self Advisor
userFlow: Type any question in the box
Result: Answer from your successful company 2 years in the future
